title: PJHB fieldMapping table — Grow ↔ Manage cross-system field reconciliation
description: PJHB Pass 6b W2 schema. Each entry maps a Grow lex_custom row to its Clio Manage equivalent (or flags it as Grow-only conversion-time data loss). Auto-populated by src/clio/scripts/bootstrap-field-mapping.ts from the operator-supplied schema snapshot.

source_snapshot_sha256.description: SHA256 of each snapshot JSON consumed at bootstrap time. Pass 7 compares against re-pull.

canonical_name.description: Slug derived from the Grow name. Use this in PJHB-side code; never the raw Grow/Manage names.

transformer.description: Named function reference. 'identity' means no transformation. Real transformers (e.g., word-form-to-decimal for 'two years') are added by Pass 7+.

validation_rules.description: Type-dependent validation. Empty object {} means no per-field rules beyond the type constraint.

drift_severity.description: low: drift is annotation-only. medium: PJHB-side reconciliation logged; paralegal review at extraction time. high: blocks file workflow until reconciled, OR Grow-only field with no Manage equivalent (conversion-time data loss).

side.description: Whether this field belongs to a matter (case file) or contact (person/company) record.

grow_only.description: True when manage_field_id is null. Conversion-time data loss.
